name: Sour Cream Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Grease bottom of a 15x10x1-inch jelly roll pan or two 9-inch square baking pans.
Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat; remove from heat.
Stir remaining ingredients, listed below, into the melted butter mixture:
- 1 1/2 cups Sugar
- 2 Eggs
- 8 oz Dairy sour cream
- 1 1/2 cups Mashed ripe bananas (3 medium)
- 2 teaspoons Vanilla
- 2 cups Self-rising flour
Spread batter in prepared pan(s).
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool in pan on wire rack.
Drizzle with Confectioners' glaze. Cut into 2x1-inch bars.
Confectioners' Glaze:
1/4 cup (1/2 stick) Butter or margarine, melted
2 cups sifted confectioners' sugar
3 tablespoons Milk
Combine ingredients in order listed in a mixing bowl; stir until smooth.
